summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of ScriptArc MVP completed successfully. All major features working including auth, dashboard, courses, leaderboard, and profile pages.

design_issues.issue: Background gradient animation component not clearly visible on landing page
Responsive design may have issues on smaller screens (tablet/mobile)

passed_tests: Backend API health endpoints (/api/, /api/health)
User registration flow with validation
User login flow with authentication
Protected endpoints return proper 403 status codes
Dashboard API returns correct user stats and progress
Courses API returns course list with proper data structure
Leaderboard API returns ranked user list
Seed data creation for demo courses
Landing page loads with hero section and navigation
Login/Register tabs switch correctly
User registration form works end-to-end
Dashboard loads with level, stars, streak, and rank cards
Courses page displays course cards with search and filtering
Leaderboard page shows rankings with top 3 podium display
Profile page loads with user stats, settings, and badges section
Navigation between all main pages works correctly
Course single page loads with enrollment options
Search functionality filters courses by title/description
Level filtering (beginner/intermediate/advanced) works
Navbar navigation between Dashboard/Courses/Leaderboard works

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 UI tests passed - 1 minor responsive issue)
